title: calcFAOBilateralTrade — calcFAOBilateralTrade
text: output "value", "qty", "price" products "kcr", "kli", "kothers" prodAgg binary keep FAO product level magpie harmonize combine input export sheets harmonization algorithm  based reliability index(Gelhar 1996) default big differences perhaps using import sheet better overall .e. matching massbal fiveYear TRUE calculate 5 years (1995 2020, 5-year steps) reduce memory load

title: calcFAOharmonized — calcFAOharmonized
text: Calculate harmonized FAO Commodity Balance Food Supply data based CB, harvested areas              taken ProdSTAT. functions adds CBCrop, CBLive, FSCrop FSLive data together.

title: calcFAOharmonized — calcFAOharmonized
text: src source "pre2010", "post2010", "join2010". "pre2010" returns FAO sheet runs 2013 (actually 2013, gets effectively chopped 2010 massbalance). "post2010" combines new FAO FB, SUA, CB sheets re-done 2010 onwards. "join2010" joins pre2010 post2010 data, taking new values 2010 onwards. output whether return FB (Food balance sheet) SUA (SUpply Utilization Accounts)

title: calcFAOmassbalance_pre — calcFAOmassbalance_pre
text: Calculates extended version Food Balance Sheets. Makes explicit conversion processes convert one type product another. Includes processes like milling, distilling, extraction etc. Adds certain byproducts like distillers grains ethanol.

title: calcFAOmassbalance_pre — calcFAOmassbalance_pre
text: version whether return new post-2010 massbalance "post2010", older sheets "pre2010", join 2010 (replace old new 2010) "join2010" years years estimated, NULL, years FAOharmonized returned

title: calcFAOmassbalance_pre — calcFAOmassbalance_pre
text: List magpie objects results country level, weight country level, unit description. intermediary result, used e.g. estimating feed baskets. uses, appropriate use FAOmasbalance instead FAOmassbalance_pre.

title: calcFAOmassbalance_pre — calcFAOmassbalance_pre
text: Benjamin Leon Bodirsky, David M Chen

title: Convert FAO data — convertFAO
text: Converts FAO data fit common country list removes converts relative values possible. Yields (Hg/ha) instance removed since can later easily calculated production area might problematic spatial aggregation. Per capita demand values transformed absolute values using population estimates calcPopulationPast function.

text: x MAgPIE object containing original values subtype FAO file type, e.g.: CBCrop

title: Convert FAOTradeMatrix — convertFAOTradeMatrix
text: Convert FAOSTAT detailed trade matrix. FAOSTAT balance harmonize import/export side reporting. Furthermore, terms trade value, exporters "usuallY" reporting FOB, importers report CIF. Difference value, given identical qty, thus transport margin mixed unharmonized reporting.

title: Convert FAOTradeMatrix — convertFAOTradeMatrix
text: x output read function subtype subsets detailed trade matrix read . large csv needs read chunks separated export/import quantities values, well kcr, kli kothers (kcr kli) Options combinations c("import_value", "import_qty", "export_value", "export_quantity") X c("kcr", "kli", "kothers")) import import side reporting export export-sde reporting

what: mrfaocore: madrat-based package providing core FAO-related preprocessing functions — mrfaocore-package
title: mrfaocore: madrat-based package providing core FAO-related preprocessing functions — mrfaocore-package
text: madrat-based package provides core FAO-related preprocessing functions.

title: mrfaocore: madrat-based package providing core FAO-related preprocessing functions — mrfaocore-package
text: Maintainer: David Chen david.chen@pik-potsdam.de Authors: Ulrich Kreidenweis Abhijeet Mishra Kristine Karstens Benjamin Leon Bodirsky Debbora Leip Mishko Stevanovic Benjamin Leon Bodrisky David Klein Edna Molina Bacca

title: Read FAO — readFAO
text: Read FAO data bulk downloaded FAOSTAT website. Files exception fodder.csv aquired : http://faostat.fao.org/Portals/_Faostat/Downloads/zip_files/

title: Read FAO — readFAO
text: subtype Type FAO data read. Available types : `CBCrop`: Commodity Balance Crop (CommodityBalances_Crops_E_All_Data.zip) `CBLive`: Commoditiy Balance Livestock (CommodityBalances_LivestockFish_E_All_Data.zip) `Crop`: Production Crops ("Production_Crops_E_All_Data.zip") `CropProc`: Production Crops Processed ("Production_CropsProcessed_E_All_Data.zip") `Fbs`: Food Balance Sheet ("FoodBalanceSheets_E_All_Data.zip") `Fertilizer`: Fertilizer ("Resources_Fertilizers_E_All_Data.zip") `Fodder`: Fodder (data manually downloaded FAOSTAT website seperate .xls files via search "forage" "fodder" withing Production-Crops. datasets added together "Fodder.csv" file) `FoodSecurity`: Food Security Data ("Food_Security_Data_E_All_Data.zip") `FSCrop`: Food Supply Crops ("FoodSupply_Crops_E_All_Data.zip") `FSLive`: Food Supply Livestock ("FoodSupply_LivestockFish_E_All_Data.zip") `Land`: Land ("Resources_Land_E_All_Data.zip") `LiveHead`: Production Live Animals ("Production_Livestock_E_All_Data.zip") `LivePrim`: Production Livestock Primary ("Production_LivestockPrimary_E_All_Data.zip") `LiveProc`: Production Livestock Processed ("Production_LivestockProcessed_E_All_Data.zip") `Pop`: Population ("Population_E_All_Data.zip") `ForestProdTrade`: Forestry Production Trade ("Forestry_E_All_Data_(Normalized).zip") `PricesProducerAnnual`: Producer Prices - Annual ("Prices_E_All_Data.zip") `PricesProducerAnnualLCU`: Producer Prices - Annual LCU ("Prices_E_All_Data.zip") `ValueOfProd`: Value Agricultural Production ("Value_of_Production_E_All_Data.zip")

title: Read FAOTradeMatrix — readFAOTradeMatrix
text: Read FAOSTAT detail trade matrix. FAOSTAT balance harmonize import/export side reporting. Furthermore, terms trade value, exporters "usuallY" reporting FOB, importers report CIF. Difference value, given identical qty, thus transport margin unharmonized reporting combined.

title: Read FAOTradeMatrix — readFAOTradeMatrix
text: subtype subsets detailed trade matrix read . large csv needs read chunks separated export/import quantities values, well kcr, kli kothers (kcr kli) Options combinations c("import_value", "import_qty", "export_value", "export_qty" X c("kcr", "kli", "kothers", "kforestry")) import import side reporting export export-sde reporting

title: Read FAO_online — readFAO_online
text: subtype Type FAO data read. Available types : `CBCrop`: Commodity Balance Crop (CommodityBalances_Crops_E_All_Data.zip) `CBLive`: Commoditiy Balance Livestock (CommodityBalances_LivestockFish_E_All_Data.zip) `Crop`: Production Crops ("Production_Crops_E_All_Data.zip") `CropProc`: Production Crops Processed ("Production_CropsProcessed_E_All_Data.zip") `FB2010`: New Food Balance Sheet, 2010 onwards ("FoodBalanceSheets_E_All_Data.zip") `SUA2010`: New Supply Utilization Accounts, 2010 onwards ("SUA_Crops_Livestock_E_All_Data_(Normalized).zip") `CB2010`: New Commodity Balance Sheets, 2010 onwards ("CommodityBalances_(non-food)_(2010-)_E_All_Data_(Normalized).zip") #nolint `Fertilizer`: Fertilizer ("Resources_Fertilizers_E_All_Data.zip") `FertilizerProducts`: Fertilizer product ("Inputs_FertilizersProduct_E_All_Data_(Normalized).zip") `FertilizerNutrients`: Fertilizer nutrient ("Inputs_FertilizersNutrient_E_All_Data_(Normalized).zip") `Fodder`: Fodder (data manually downloaded FAOSTAT website seperate .xls files via search "forage" "fodder" withing Production-Crops. datasets added together "Fodder.csv" file) `FoodSecurity`: Food Security Data ("Food_Security_Data_E_All_Data.zip") `FSCrop`: Food Supply Crops ("FoodSupply_Crops_E_All_Data.zip") `FSLive`: Food Supply Livestock ("FoodSupply_LivestockFish_E_All_Data.zip") `Land`: Land ("Resources_Land_E_All_Data.zip") `LiveHead`: Production Live Animals ("Production_Livestock_E_All_Data.zip") `LivePrim`: Production Livestock Primary ("Production_LivestockPrimary_E_All_Data.zip") `LiveProc`: Production Livestock Processed ("Production_LivestockProcessed_E_All_Data.zip") `Pop`: Population ("Population_E_All_Data.zip") `ForestProdTrade`: Forestry Production Trade ("Forestry_E_All_Data_(Normalized).zip") `PricesProducerAnnual`: Producer Prices - Annual ("Prices_E_All_Data.zip") `PricesProducerAnnualLCU`: Producer Prices - Annual LCU ("Prices_E_All_Data.zip") `ValueOfProd`: Value Agricultural Production ("Value_of_Production_E_All_Data.zip") `ValueShares`: Value shares industry primary factors `Trade`: Trade quantities values

title: Read product attributes — readProductAttributes
text: Read-file containing attributes MAgPIE products. Currently Covers dry matter (DM), reactive nitrogen (Nr), Phosphorus (P), Generalizable Energy (GE) wet matter (WM). Values assembled various literature sources, weighting allocation done spreadsheet crop_specifications_06_2011.ods livestock_specifications_2012_06_14.ods svn folder /tools/Nutrients . Values standardized DM.
